title: 3 Stocks for the GARP Investor

title: ESG Success by the Numbers: Jabil Releases 2021 Sustainability Report

title: Jabil Releases Findings of Edge Retail Survey Underscoring Latest Advancements in Omnichannel Retail Strategies
text: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Jabil (NYSE: JBL) today announced the results of a North American survey of omnichannel retail decision makers, which identified top trends, opportunities and obstacles in the development and deployment of innovative edge-retail solutions.
